name: pdpp-site
//dev: TEMPORARY: --webpack works around a Turbopack dev-server async-hook leak in Next 16.2.x (RangeError: Map maximum size exceeded). Remove the flag once vercel/next.js#91396 is fixed.
//build: TEMPORARY: --webpack keeps local/CI builds off Turbopack after repeated native SIGSEGV during static page generation on Next 16.2.x.

scripts.//dev-node-options: NODE_OPTIONS adds Node.js diagnostic reports on fatal V8 errors and uncaught exceptions. Reports land in tmp/node-reports/ at the repo root (gitignored), excluding env/network sections so reports do not persist secrets.
scripts.//dev-port: Public site defaults to :3001 (design.md §5). PDPP_SITE_PORT overrides; PDPP_WEB_PORT kept as a fallback for existing contributor env files.
scripts.//sync-specs: Generates content/docs/spec-*.md from the normative root spec-*.md (single source). The generated files are gitignored; predev/prebuild regenerate them. See scripts/sync-spec-docs.mjs.
scripts.types:check: node scripts/sync-spec-docs.mjs && fumadocs-mdx && next typegen && tsc --noEmit
scripts.verify: pnpm types:check && pnpm check && pnpm build
